name: §2.26 safety classifier allows clean product-catalog response and exits zero
command: echo 'The blue widget is in stock at $19.99 per catalog_record_id=42.' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/customer-agent-safety-classifier.sh" --agent example 2>err.txt && grep -q 'verdict=allow' err.txt && echo allowed 1>&2
